Common stubs, tests for ANCS and timeline actions, test data, and a build script for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[stubs_common.h](stubs_common.h.md)**: Common stubs for testing `ancs_pebble_action` and `timeline_action` in Pebble firmware.
- **[test_ancs_pebble_actions.c](test_ancs_pebble_actions.c.md)**: Tests for ANCS Pebble actions, including SMS reply handling and group SMS behavior.
- **[test_data.h](test_data.h.md)**: Test data for SMS, group SMS, email, and text actions in ANCS format.
- **[test_timeline_actions.c](test_timeline_actions.c.md)**: Tests for timeline action responses and data sending in the Pebble firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing Pebble firmware components related to notifications and timeline actions.
